description: Catalog of presentation audiences available in the openpresentation.org catalog. Each entry is a lightweight summary; full audience records (seniority, technical fluency, decision power, attention budget, recommended narratives and tones) live in the per-id JSON files alongside this index. Audiences are referenced from OPF documents via audience.

records.name: Executives
records.summary: Senior leaders who need the recommendation up front, the evidence behind it, and the ask.

records.name: Board of Directors
records.summary: Directors with fiduciary responsibility who balance oversight, advice, and approval.

records.name: Engineering Team
records.summary: Practitioners building the system; they want depth, mechanism, and tradeoffs.

records.name: Investors
records.summary: Capital allocators evaluating fit, traction, and risk-adjusted return.

records.name: Customers
records.summary: Buyers and users — outcome-focused, allergic to jargon, sensitive to time.

records.name: Sales Team
records.summary: Quota-carrying reps who want talk tracks, objection handling, and crisp proof.

records.name: Marketing Team
records.summary: Brand and demand-gen practitioners aligning on positioning, messaging, and campaigns.

records.name: All Hands
records.summary: The full company — mixed roles, mixed seniority, looking for context, signal, and inclusion.

records.name: Candidates
records.summary: Potential hires evaluating company, role, and people.

records.name: Regulators
records.summary: Government, agency, and policy reviewers evaluating compliance, risk, and impact.
